description: Performance after ballast failure: 1. The most direct and obvious phenomenon is that the bulb is off. 2. The bulb can be turned on normally, but the fault alarm indicator on the dashboard is on. 3. The bulb blinks or turns off often or the left and right lights do not turn on at the same time. 4. There is a sound click in the car audio player.
